_purpose: FROZEN before outcomes. Test DS in its VERIFIED niche on a REAL LABELED dynamics change: irrigation start/stop (gain/loss of a growing-season cycle = multi-harmonic dynamics change). Labels from IrrMapper (UMT/Climate/IrrMapper_RF/v1_2, classification 0=irrigated). The fire test failed because a fire is a sharp shift; irrigation switch is the right regime.
switch_rule: switched-on: not-irrigated in 2017-2018 AND irrigated in 2021-2022; switched-off: reverse. constant: same status all 6 years. switch_year = first year of the new status.
future_baseline: BFAST harmonic-break (multi-harmonic) -- the natural classical comparator; add after first run.

preregistered_claims.C1_detect: switched sites show a larger DS change-score (max d1 or d_pre rise) than constant sites -> AUC(switched vs constant) > 0.7.
preregistered_claims.C2_localize: for switched sites, the DS change-score peaks within +-1 year of the IrrMapper switch year.
preregistered_claims.C3_beats_minangle_and_scalar: full DS AUC >= min-angle AUC and >= NDVI-amplitude-step AUC (the verified-regime claim on real data).
preregistered_claims.C4_attribution: DS per-band attribution at the switch favors NIR/red-edge/SWIR (vegetation/moisture cycle bands).
preregistered_claims.C5_control_quiet: constant sites show low DS change-scores.

falsifier: If switched sites are not separable from constant (AUC<=0.7), OR full DS does not beat min-angle AND NDVI-amplitude -> NEGATIVE; the diagnostic paper stands (DS niche does not transfer even to its best real regime).
no_tuning_rule: Frozen. Exploration only on a held-out region, never tuned to make the switched-vs-constant separation look better.
